title: Décor Insulated Cool Touch Double Wall Travel Coffee Cup, Leak Proof Seal and Button Press Release Drink Feature. Vacuum Insulated, 4 Hours Hot and 12 Hours Cold. Navy Blue 350ml.

Reusable & Durable - Décor have been making lives easier for over 60 years with homewares that are functional, affordable and made to last
